metadata.title: Best-case 2026-2030 milestone-support case
metadata.scenario_purpose: Explore supportive thermodynamic, economic, governance, and regulatory conditions under which Terafab-scale milestones are more likely to be achieved in 2026-2030.

phase.notes: Supportive case; not a verified Terafab phase status.

one_terawatt_treatment.notes: This case does not assert a one-terawatt site load.
